name: runtime_txn
description: One row per dispatched transaction (committable or not), with the execution results

bank_seq.description: Monotonic sequence number identifying this block within the current run; the join key to block_completed. Restarts at 1 each time a snapshot is loaded, so pair it with the stream's boot id. 0 means unavailable.

slot.description: Bank slot in which this transaction was executed

epoch.description: Epoch the transaction was executed in

signature.description: First signature of the transaction (64 bytes)

dispatch_fec_mr.description: Merkle root of the most recently completed FEC set in the block at the time this txn was dispatched for execution

is_simple_vote.description: True if the transaction was classified as a simple vote, false otherwise

is_bundle.description: True if the transaction is part of a Jito bundle, false otherwise

is_committable.description: True if the transaction was committable (landed on-chain)

is_fees_only.description: True if the transaction landed but only fees were charged (e.g. account loading failure)

txn_err.description: Absolute value of transaction execution error (0 = success)

exec_err.description: Absolute value of the instruction execution error, only meaningful when txn_err = INSTRUCTION_ERROR

exec_err_kind.description: Absolute kind of the instruction execution error; only meaningful when txn_err = INSTRUCTION_ERROR

exec_err_idx.description: Instruction index that failed (INT_MAX if not applicable)

custom_err.description: Custom error code returned by the program (only meaningful for CUSTOM_ERROR)

compute_unit_limit.description: Compute unit limit requested by the transaction

compute_unit_price.description: Compute unit price (micro-lamports per CU) requested by the transaction

compute_units_consumed.description: compute_unit_limit minus the remaining compute meter at commit

heap_size.description: Requested heap size for the VM

num_builtin_instrs.description: Number of builtin program instructions in the transaction

loaded_accounts_data_size.description: Total bytes of account data loaded for this transaction

loaded_accounts_data_size_limit.description: Configured loaded-accounts-data-size limit for this transaction

accounts_resize_delta.description: Absolute magnitude of net delta in writable account data sizes during execution; check accounts_resize_is_negative for sign

accounts_resize_is_negative.description: True when the net delta is negative (writable account data net shrunk during execution)

execution_fee.description: Execution fee paid by the fee payer

priority_fee.description: Priority fee paid by the fee payer

signature_count.description: Number of signatures in the transaction

cost_allocated_accounts_data_size.description: Allocated accounts data size from the cost tracker

account_diffs.description: Per-account diffs for writable accounts that were modified

is_executable.description: True if the post-state account is executable

is_stake_update.description: True if this write touched the stake cache

is_vote_update.description: True if this write touched the vote cache

is_new_vote.description: True if this write created a new vote account

is_rm_vote.description: True if this write removed a vote account

writable_accounts.description: Every account the transaction locked as writable

readonly_accounts.description: Every account the transaction locked as readonly, in account-order

program_ids.description: Distinct program pubkeys invoked at the top level of this transaction
